package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_route_registration_anonymous_function_overuse: Route registration that uses many inline anonymous handlers instead of named handler methods or functions.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule055NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule055NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule055NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario055Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule055NegativeService, input Rule055NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
